title: Elements should not have tabindex greater than zero
summary: Avoid positive tabindex; rely on natural DOM order (tabindex="0"/"-1" only).

code.title: Elements should not have tabindex greater than zero
code.summary: Avoid positive tabindex; rely on natural DOM order (tabindex="0"/"-1" only).
code.what_changed: Avoid positive tabindex; rely on natural DOM order (tabindex="0"/"-1" only).
code.why: Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0

improvement_summary: The redesigned version fixes 'Elements should not have tabindex greater than zero'. Avoid positive tabindex; rely on natural DOM order (tabindex="0"/"-1" only). This addresses a serious barrier and improves conformance with WCAG best practices.
highlights: Resolves a serious issue mapped to WCAG best practice
